title: cheilanthes tenuifolia subsp. caudata
intro: Cheilanthes tenuifolia subsp. caudata, also known as the narrow-leaved rock fern or Caudate Rock Fern, is a species of fern in the Cheilanthes genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cheilanthes tenuifolia subsp. caudata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as a tea or used in tinctures, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
